{{Quote|That kid is twelve going on thirty. He doesn't need protection from ''me''.|[[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]]|<ref name="Star Wars Science Adventures: Emergency in Escape Pod Four">''[[Star Wars Science Adventures: Emergency in Escape Pod Four]]''</ref>}}
'''Stuart Zissu''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] male [[Rebel pilot/Legends|Rebel pilot]] and the son of the [[Governor/Legends|governor]] of [[Delantine]], [[Trux Zissu]]. His mother died before he was twelve.

{{Char-stub}}

==Personality and traits==
Zissu was a bit of a rebel and would play [[space poker]] with the [[T-65 X-wing starfighter/Legends|X-wing]] pilots while on [[Yavin 4/Legends|Yavin 4]]. In addition, he pulled pranks such as dumping [[Bassel sea salt]] into the food, causing the pilots to use up their water rations.

Zissu was a quick study: he learned how to pilot [[escape pod 4]] with only some drawings about physics from [[4B-X]].
